storyInfo: In Uika's dream, Sakiko rides a boat to a desolate isle where she learns of the many years Uika has waited for her, alone. Meanwhile, Uika is forced to face her feelings, thanks to the questions posed by her new friend Eyjafjalla.

attributes.text: I take my most fragile memories and wrap them up tight, until not a soul is left who knows.
But even as I shout until my voice is raw, is there any hope of making her hear me?

attributes.content: After enduring the rocking of the boat, stepping onto solid ground finally brings Sakiko a sense of reassurance.
'Preciate you chatting with me, young miss.
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: This island's one hell of a trip from the mainland. Why, if I only had the surface of the water for company, I'd go mad from boredom.
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: It was a pleasure to talk to you. I rather enjoyed hearing your tales of the sea.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Reminds me, you don't dress like a local. What brings you to this podunk little island?
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: ...I'm looking for someone.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: She a local?
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: I don't... imagine so.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: That's mighty strange then. This island's all people who wanna get off it. Never heard of anyone wanting to come over.
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: To be honest, I'm not entirely sure if she's here or not...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: All she has in hand is a ticket to the island. Even if it does turn out to be a prank on Morpheus's part, she has no other choice.
(Pats her shoulder) Ah, it'll be fine! With this few people on the island, you'll be done asking if anyone's seen her in no time!
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: ...Yes.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: But one thing. Doesn't matter if you find her or not, you have to be back here by noon.
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: Not many boats come this way. If you miss this one when it leaves, you'll be stuck until next month.
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: But it's nearly...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: *sigh* Sorry, not much I can do.
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: I can wait for you some, but it's not safe on the seas at night. We need to be back on the mainland before sundown.
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Boatman

attributes.content: ...Right, I'll be going now then!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: (Loudly) Do—re—mi—
Yes, I can hear you.
(Quietly) Do—re—mi—
I just went through it again, further away... Were you unable to hear it?
Yes... I didn't hear anything just now.
...Let me get that blindfold off of you first.
How are my results?
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: I hate to say this, but... compared to last time, it seems like the range I can hear has gotten even smaller.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: I see... Okay, I understand. I'll be more aware of environmental conditions on my future surveys.
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: Eyjafjalla, you should cherish your personal safety more.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: How long have you been on the island?
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: I arrived two months ago.
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: Your hearing is getting worse, but we don't have a formal doctor here who can help you.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: There should be a boat at the dock today. I'll pack your luggage for you, and then you can set off for home.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: I can't. I still have one last round of data to collect from the volcano here...
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: But your health—
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Before I came here, I had a doctor at Rhodes Island give me a health assessment.
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: Umm... While my situation isn't very optimistic, I did promise her I would be back within three months.
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: She knows how important my volcanological research is to me, so she agreed to me coming here in the end.
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: I love volcanos, Miss Uika, just as much as you love the stars.
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: Wasn't the very first time we met up on the mountain, that night when I got lost, and stumbled upon you watching the stars?
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: ...Next time you head up there to survey, remember to call me along.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Yes, of course!
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: The weather's so fine this morning...
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: Miss Uika, could you sing a song to me?
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: Some music would go perfectly with weather like this, while we gaze out at the volcano and the sea far away.
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: Alright. I'll come in a little closer...
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Uika narrows the gap between the two of them. She sees Eyjafjalla's little ears perk up, the hearing aids visible inside.
(Deep breath)
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.text: 'As I paint the twisted sky, I think,'
\n\n'I wish you'd, without wings, just fall,'

attributes.content: That was beautiful!
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: ...Thanks.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Who wrote this song? I don't think I've heard it elsewhere. Is it a local song?
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: I don't know either. It's probably just something I heard before, and it just stuck in my memory...
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: But, Miss Uika... You look so sad right now.
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: Huh...?
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Hm? Uika Misumi?
attributes.name: Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: John, you ever hear of that name?
attributes.name: Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: Don't recall. Sounds like someone not from the island.
attributes.name: Another Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: Could I trouble you to keep thinking over it, sir?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: I heard from an old woman nearby that you're the most social person on this island, and that you know more people than anyone else. I'm sure something you know could serve as a lead...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: *sigh*... Not many people on the island, though. If none of us at all have heard the name, it must be a newcomer, right?
attributes.name: Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: Hey, wait, wasn't there talk about some weirdo living in a villa on the volcano's back side?
attributes.name: Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: Hmm... I think there was someone there, yeah.
attributes.name: Another Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: Can't quite remember her name, but I wanna say she's the only one you could be looking for.
attributes.name: Another Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: Where is she right now?!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Well, follow the road circling the island north for twenty kilometers. Once you reach the back of the mountain, you'll see the villa.
attributes.name: No-Longer-Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: Alright. Twenty kilometers, that should be about half an hour by car...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Oh, we don't have cars here.
attributes.name: No-Longer-Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: You don't have cars?!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Didn't you realize when you came here? We don't have cars.
attributes.name: Another No-Longer-Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: But the roads are clearly well-maintained...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: We wanted to attract tourists to the island. We fixed everything up... and nobody came. We just ended up even more broke.
attributes.name: No-Longer-Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: If you're in a hurry, missy, borrow this here bike.
attributes.name: No-Longer-Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: It's not in the prettiest shape, but there's some use in it still. If you pedal hard, you should make it in about two hours.
attributes.name: No-Longer-Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: Sakiko looks at the old bicycle behind the old man. Its frame is shabby and worn-out, nearly denuded of paint. Everything about it screams 'scrap heap'.
Good luck! Been a long time since we saw any new faces here. Hope you find who you're looking for! Oh, and enjoy your time on our island!
attributes.name: Another No-Longer-Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: Thank you, sir. If you'll excuse me, then.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Sakiko places a foot lightly on the pedal—

attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa
attributes.content: As long... as this bike... can move...

attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa
attributes.content: No problem!
Careful there, you're heading straight downhill—
attributes.name: No-Longer-Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: The warning comes a little too late. The girl and the dilapidated bike are already careening out of control as they shoot down the slope.
AAAAAHHHHHHHH———!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: ...Now wasn't that funny?
attributes.name: No-Longer-Puzzled Islander

attributes.content: Hahahahahah-hah-hah...
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: She really is far too funny! Hah-hahahahah!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Mor—Morpheus.
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: I... think... that was—a... bit overboard...
attributes.name: Wolff

attributes.content: Shut it.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: She's the one who agreed to this bet. I'm only abiding by our terms.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: I'll find her weak spot, I'm telling you, and once I do I'll spin her a dream from which she'll never wake.
attributes.name: Morpheus
Morpheus
attributes.content: She'll learn...

attributes.name: Morpheus
attributes.content: I am the Castle of Dreams' most talented dreamspinner.
...There's no way, no way, that Iris could be better than me.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: The sun's nearly overhead, and there's not much shade under the trees...
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: It's getting rather hot now.
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: My residence is close by. Why don't we go there to sit down?
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Oh—wow, it really is cooler the moment you step inside!
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: This living room is so big—it must get cold in the winter, right?
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: The house warms up very quickly if I light the fireplace. The one over there, see.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: But when I'm by myself, a little heater by the sofa is enough.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: Wow, I had no idea at all you were so well-off...
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: I think you're misunderstanding something. I'm not an heiress or anything, I'm just the housekeeper here.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: (Quietly) Am I going to disturb the owner...?
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: No, don't worry. I'm the only one here right now.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: She—the owner of this place... she hasn't been back for a very long time.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: It... sounds like you really miss her.
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: Yes. Our relationship might be a bit more special than master and servant...
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: She was the first one to see me as I am. She was the first one to ever make friends with me.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: She loved playing the piano. I would sit next to her, and sing along.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: At first, we were happy... So very happy.
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: But then, why did she leave? Why would she leave this island, her... home?
attributes.name: Eyjafjalla

attributes.content: Why indeed... Maybe, just maybe, it was only me who wanted to stay here?
attributes.name: Uika Misumi

attributes.content: The bicycle's creaking grows ever more shrill, and Sakiko's balance is increasingly precarious.
Matters aren't helped by her waning stamina.
AHHHH—!
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: At a sharp turn, the bicycle flies completely out of control, and Sakiko's inertia sees her abruptly tumble away.
Guh...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: She pulls her body up, gritting her teeth through the pain. With great effort, she lifts her head to look to her destination.
At the foot of a distant mountain, she sees the vague outline of a house.
That's...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: As she stares at it, countless unfamiliar memories flood into her mind out of nowhere—
Th-that's...
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: In Uika's dream, Sakiko and her played there as children.
When they grew up, they lived there together.
These... these are all part of Uika's dream?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Hmm-hmm—♪ Hmm-hm-hmm—♪
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Hm... Well, you did see it, yes? Oh, all the sweet dreams I spun for her, but this Uika girl? Her biggest wish is to be with you.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Problem. At the end of each dream, she's all alone.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: You always vanish suddenly—
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Sakiko Togawa, you're a cruel, cruel person.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: I... Cruel...?
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Didn't the pest give you the whole sermon?
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Dreams are the truest thoughts of the heart's depths. And in the heart of Uika Misumi, well—the more she longs to be with you, the less she can touch you.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: I can weave a tiny little uninhabited isle just for the two of you, and yet all she can do is experience the pain of losing what she gains, again, and again. And again.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: This little happiness of hers is doomed to slip through her fingers like sand.
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Tut, tut. What kind of heart holds such despair that even dreams can't cure it?
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: ...Uika, I'm going to pull you out of this nightmare.
attributes.name: Sakiko Togawa

attributes.content: Are you really? Are you really?!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: Now that's something I'd LOVE to see—the look of helpless, raging humiliation all over your face, that is!
attributes.name: Morpheus

attributes.content: As Morpheus cackles with wild abandon, a faraway boat sounds its horn.
The signal that it is about to return to the mainland.
